update.confirmBody: Perception and automation will be briefly interrupted (a few minutes) during the upgrade; the page will reconnect automatically. Upgrade now?
update.upgradingHint: Please keep this page open — it will refresh automatically when the upgrade completes.
update.slowHint: A first-time upgrade downloads a large package and may take several minutes — please wait.
update.runInBackground: Move to background (reopen via the version in the sidebar)
update.timeoutTitle: Upgrade didn't finish in the expected time
update.timeoutHint: The upgrade may still be running in the background, or it may not have succeeded. Refresh the page later to check; if it stays unavailable for a long time, please ask your administrator for help.
update.failedHint: This upgrade could not be completed and you're still running the current version. Refresh the page to confirm; you can retry the upgrade later, and if it keeps failing please ask your administrator for help.
update.footerUpdateAria: New version {{version}} available — click to upgrade
update.upToDate: You're already on the latest version ({{version}})
update.devDeploy: This is a git source deployment — run git pull and restart the service to update (one-click upgrade is for release deployments only)
update.checkFailed: Couldn't check for updates right now (update server unreachable)
update.authError: Authentication failed during the upgrade (your session may have expired). Refresh and sign in again to check the upgrade result.
